insights.title: Labor overran budget by 13.1%
insights.finding: Total labor actual $57,918 vs budget $51,190 — $6,728 unfavorable variance. Review crew mix and productivity.

insights.title: Scope stability — 4 executed COs net $10,183 (+0.00% of contract)
insights.finding: Minimal scope churn indicates well-defined contract and experienced GC. Candidate GC profile for future similar bids.

insights.title: Largest variance — cost code 230 (Finish Material) under by $26,563
insights.finding: Budget $59,219, actual $32,656 (-44.9%). Flag for bid calibration.

direct_cost.source: Σ labor + material + OH + burden + tax

TIES = within $1 or 5 hrs  •  WITHIN = within 5%  •  OFF = investigate
K. CHANGE LOG ↔ ROOT CAUSE ANALYSIS
N. CHANGE LOG ↔ METRIC REGISTRY (event counts)
12 analytical tabs + Change Log + Root Cause Analysis + Predictive Signals + Metric Registry + Reconciliation
Canonical source: 2022 Job Detail Report.pdf (Sage Timberline export)
Change artifacts: folders scanned — ASI-RFI, Change Orders, Submittals, Invoices (Backcharges), JDR cost codes
Every Change Log row cites its source document path
TIES = within $1/5hrs/exact count  •  WITHIN = within 5%  •  OFF = investigate
Cross-sheet formulas (='Tab'!Cell) update automatically when source tabs change
